name: Rudi Willock
build_log_note: A running collection of things I've built, repaired, and engineered — from electronics to mechanical systems.
about_text: I'm a repair technician, backline tech, and builder based in Indianapolis. I fix amps, synths, and electronics — and I build custom projects from circuit design through final assembly. I'm comfortable taking something broken or half-formed and turning it into something that works well and lasts.
